prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 61.2 kg; Height 177.2 cm; BMI 19.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.3%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.3%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 180mg/dL; 9 months ago 149mg/dL; 6 months ago 211mg/dL; 3 months ago 194mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.1kg; 9 months ago 63.3kg; 6 months ago 58.7kg; 3 months ago 59.1kg; current 61.2kg), Height (12 months ago 177.2cm; 9 months ago 177.2cm; 6 months ago 177.2cm; 3 months ago 177.2cm; current 177.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 10U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 23U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; current 9mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 924mg/g; 9 months ago 991mg/g; 6 months ago 1122mg/g; 3 months ago 846mg/g; current 764mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 58mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 115mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 114mg/dL; 3 months ago 131mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.3g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.49 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
